ddls:
CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_title" TEXT /* Title of the position held */,
  "position_type" TEXT /* Type of position (permanent, temporary, committee membership) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the position */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the position */,
  "tenure_period" TEXT /* Duration of the tenure in a human-readable format */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the position */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID reference to the department (if applicable) */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* ID reference to the committee (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_position_type FOREIGN KEY ("position_type") REFERENCES position_types ("position_type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each official */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the official */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the official */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID reference to the department the official belongs to */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the official */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the official */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment record */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID reference to the position held */,
  "official_id" INTEGER /* ID reference to the official holding the position */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date when the appointment was made */,
  "appointment_type" TEXT /* Type of appointment (e.g., permanent, temporary, acting) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_official_id FOREIGN KEY ("official_id") REFERENCES officials ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_appointment_type FOREIGN KEY ("appointment_type") REFERENCES appointment_types ("appointment_type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries related to the department */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the department */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "committees" (
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committee */,
  "committee_name" TEXT /* Name of the committee */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the committee's purpose */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the committee was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "committee_membership" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committee membership record */,
  "official_id" INTEGER /* ID reference to the official in the committee */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* ID reference to the committee */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the membership */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the membership */,
  "membership_type" TEXT /* Type of membership (e.g., chairperson, member, advisor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_committee_membership_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_committee_membership_official_id FOREIGN KEY ("official_id") REFERENCES officials ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_committee_membership_membership_type FOREIGN KEY ("membership_type") REFERENCES membership_types ("membership_type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, manager, viewer) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID reference to the user assigned a role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID reference to the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "position_types" (
  "position_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position type */,
  "position_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the position type (e.g., Minister, Parliamentary Secretary, Committee Member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointment_types" (
  "appointment_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment type */,
  "appointment_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the appointment type (e.g., Permanent, Temporary, Acting) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "membership_types" (
  "membership_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership type */,
  "membership_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the membership type (e.g., Chairperson, Member, Advisor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_type_id")
)
